meta.description: Master index for all military-to-civilian occupation crosswalks
meta.usage: Use this to route lookups to the correct branch-specific crosswalk file

navy.pattern: 2-3 letter rating code (e.g., DC, IT, HM, CTN)

space_force.pattern: Same as Air Force AFSC format - context needed to distinguish
space_force.note: Space Force inherited AFSC format from Air Force. Disambiguate by asking user or checking space-related codes.

coast_guard.pattern: 2-3 letter rating (e.g., BM, MK, AST, MST)

lookup_logic.description: JavaScript/TypeScript logic to determine branch from code
